title: A high-resolution transcriptomic and spatial atlas of cell types in the whole mouse brain
abstract: Comprehensive atlas of 5,322 cell type clusters in the adult mouse brain using single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) and multiplexed error-robust fluorescence in situ hybridization (MERFISH). Provides a high-resolution transcriptomic and spatial reference for the entire mouse brain, enabling systematic identification of cell types and their spatial distributions across all brain regions.
notes: New paper. Foundational whole-mouse-brain cell type atlas from Allen Institute.
